item.title: About me
item.description: I study Environmental Engineering at TU-Braunschweig and currently work on Direct Air Carbon Capture Technologies. Experience ILR, TU Berlin | Research Assistant | Oct 2025 - Current iPAT, TU Braunschweig | Research Assistant | Oct 2023 - Current IRI THESys, Humboldt University of Berlin | Visiting Scholar | April 2025 - July 2025 ILR, TU Berlin | Research Assistant (Studienarbeit) | Oct 2024 - March 2025 ISM, TU Braunschweig | Research Assistant | Jan 2023 - Oct 2023 FOSSEE, IIT Bombay | Research Assistant | Mar 2022 - Sep 2022 ISTRAC, ISRO | Intern | Jan 2020 - Mar 2020
